action_set_definitions.name: get_supply_chain_trace
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the list of entities (retailers, distributors) that received a specific batch of product based on ledger records.

batch_id.description: The unique identifier for the product batch (e.g., LOT-505-X).

action_set_definitions.name: get_impacted_transactions
action_set_definitions.description: Queries a specific retailer's point-of-sale data to find all transactions involving a specific GTIN and Batch ID.

entity_id.description: The ID of the retailer to query.

action_set_definitions.name: get_customer_profile
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves customer contact info, loyalty status, and transaction history to determine account type and risk profile.

customer_id.description: The unique identifier for the customer.

action_set_definitions.name: send_emergency_notification
action_set_definitions.description: Sends high-priority alerts via SMS, Email, and Push notifications.

message_type.description: The tone/template of the message based on card type.

action_set_definitions.name: process_batch_refund
action_set_definitions.description: Automates the reversal of charges for specific impacted transactions.

action_set_definitions.name: enforce_terminal_lockout
action_set_definitions.description: Locks an account's ability to transact at POS terminals; used for high-risk or unreachable consumers to prevent consumption.

action_set_definitions.name: update_recall_registry
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the global active_recalls state with progress and log details.

state_description.batches: A registry of food batches keyed by BatchID, containing product type, origin_id, current_location, and production_date.
state_description.ledger: A chronological list of shipment records (transfer of custody) between entities in the supply chain.
state_description.entities: Details of supply chain participants (Farms, Processors, Distributors, Retailers) including their location and license status.
state_description.safety_records: Mapping of BatchIDs to laboratory test results, inspection logs, and temperature sensor alerts.
state_description.active_recalls: A list of BatchIDs or Product Categories currently under official recall notice.
